notes: We compute realized volatility (annualized) on 4h bars over a rolling 30-bar window (~5 days).
Regime classification: low if rv < threshold (250 bps annualized), high otherwise.
Entry: low->high regime switch AND price re-tests the VPVR POC after the switch (POC test).
We then take the opposite direction (mean-reversion): if price pumped on vol expansion, short back to POC.
Exit: regime reverses back to low OR stop loss (4x ATR) OR time stop (18 bars = 3 days).
Direction: long+short (bidirectional). Universe: SOLUSDT (single symbol, vol-driven coin).
